debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
digits : Usa1972P3.DigitSeq n
⊢ (PMF.toOuterMeasure (Usa1972P3.unifDistN n)) (Usa1972P3.good_seqs n) = Usa1972P3.solution n

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  rw [PMF.toOuterMeasure_apply, PMF.uniformOfFintype_apply, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul,
    ENNReal.mul_inv_eq_div, DigitSeq, Fintype.card_fun, Digit, Fintype.card_fin, solution]
  simp only [Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_ofNat, ENNReal.one_sub_div, ENNReal.div_pow]
  let univ := Finset.univ (α := DigitSeq n)
  let A := univ.filter (fun s ↦ ∀ i, ¬ 2 ∣ to_nat_digit (s i))
  let B := univ.filter (fun s ↦ ∀ i, ¬ 5 ∣ to_nat_digit (s i))
  have hA : A.card = 5 ^ n := by
    simp [A, to_nat_digit, Finset.card_univ_filter_fun_forall, Finset.card_fin,
      (by decide : (Finset.univ.filter fun d : Digit ↦ ¬2 ∣ d.val + 1).card = 5)]
  have hB : B.card = 8 ^ n := by
    simp [B, to_nat_digit, Finset.card_univ_filter_fun_forall, Finset.card_fin,
      (by decide : (Finset.univ.filter fun d : Digit ↦ ¬5 ∣ d.val + 1).card = 8)]
  have hAB : (A ∩ B).card = 4 ^ n := by
    simp [A, B, to_nat_digit, Finset.card_univ_filter_fun_forall, Finset.card_fin,
      (by decide : (Finset.univ.filter fun d : Digit ↦ ¬2 ∣ d.val + 1 ∧ ¬5 ∣ d.val + 1).card = 4)]
  have h_compl : (good_seqs : Set (DigitSeq n)).toFinsetᶜ = A ∪ B := by
    ext s; simp [good_seqs, is_good_seq, A, B, Nat.lcm_two_five_dvd_iff.symm,
      Nat.Prime.dvd_prod_iff Nat.prime_two, Nat.Prime.dvd_prod_iff Nat.prime_five, to_nat_digit]
  have h_card : (good_seqs : Set (DigitSeq n)).toFinset.card = 9^n - (5^n + 8^n - 4^n) := by
    rw [←Finset.card_compl, h_compl, Finset.card_union_eq_card_add_sub_card_inter, hA, hB, hAB,
      Finset.card_univ, Fintype.card_fun, Fintype.card_fin]
  rw [Set.toFinset_card, h_card, Nat.cast_sub (by omega), Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_sub (by omega)]
  repeat rw [ENNReal.sub_div (by simp)]
  rw [ENNReal.add_div]
